title: NoAdvancements
description: Tired of the standard advancement message?
body:
# What is it?
With help of the plugin you can:
1. Change message (many random messages) of an advancement when a player gets it.
1. Mute an advancement.
1. Disable gaining of an advancement in some world.
   
# Configuration
Default config can be found [here](https://github.com/AlekseyVideman/NoAdvancements/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml).

# Reqruirements
1. Paper or its forks.
1. Java 21 minimium.
